sourceMovie.title: Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul (2020) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Howl's Moving Castle
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul clicked for you, Howl's Moving Castle (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and adventure, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul?
faq.answer: Try Howl's Moving Castle, Attack on Titan: Crimson Bow and Arrow, That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Scarlet Bond—each shares DNA with Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul?
faq.answer: Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul (2020) is best described as Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Made in Abyss: Dawn of the Deep Soul part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Made in Abyss Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
